form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr5) over 1730m after being wide early at this track, at the bell was 9th-25.3 beaten 11 m by Lochinvar Jag (2:03.80) in NR up to 68 on April 1 at $16. Before that, a game effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr8) over 1730m at this track, beaten 24 m by Megs Boy (2:01.30) in NR up to 75 on March 25 at $12. In the mix from the inside draw.
